name: Surana Solar Limited
summary: Surana Solar Limited manufactures and sells solar panels and solar photovoltaic modules in India and internationally. It operates through Solar products, and Wind and Solar Power segments. It also generates wind and solar power; and trades in other solar related products. The company was formerly known as Surana Ventures Limited. Surana Solar Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Secunderabad, India.
